engine.ladder_reasoning: The firm sells defined expertise (custom design + manufacture + installation, turnkey projects) and leans on 30+ years of experience, testimonials, trust/value statements and partnerships to win the hire; the galleries support that argument rather than being the whole decision.

goal.one_action: submit the contact form (or call/email) to inquire about a custom interior design project

structure.archetype_note: Classic multi-page design-firm site: home overview → services → gallery/collections → contact form. Brand Story nav page not captured.

mapped.observed_as: Our Gallery / Contemporary / Classic / Commercial / Corporate / EXCLUSIVE INTERIORS galleries

confidence.why: fetch_quality is full; 4 of 5 pages captured with clear sections, CTAs, form fields and proof counts. Only the Brand Story page was not captured, which does not change the classification.

gap_findings: Interior-design firms straddle trust and work: strong expertise/testimonial argument AND a large 60-item gallery spine. Current engine set forces one; the galleries were mapped to miscellaneous since there is no dedicated portfolio/gallery canonical section id.
